title: Steel Arms
description: Complete a drop block without using your feet (campus style).

title: Silent Feet
description: Climb a route without your feet making noise when touching the holds.

title: The Statue
description: Stay stable on each hold for 5 seconds.

title: Absurd Speed
description: Finish a low level boulder in under 15 seconds.

title: Blind Stick
description: Memorize the block and climb with your eyes closed.

title: The Master Hook
description: Overcome a step using a mandatory heel or instep hook (kick)

title: Zen Balance
description: Release both hands and stay on your feet alone for 10s.

title: Leap of Faith
description: Throw a two-handed dynamic towards distant prey.

title: Iron Finger
description: Complete a route using only two fingers per hand on large holds.

title: Dance Step
description: Do a change of feet by jumping (without touching the wall) on a small hold.

title: The Aragonese
description: Make yourself a block on campus with your feet flexed towards your back.

title: The Spider
description: Climb always maintaining 3 points of contact with the wall.

title: Thumbless
description: Complete a block without using your thumb to clamp any hold.

title: Vertical Yoga
description: Raise one foot to hand height before progressing to the next hold.

title: Relays
description: As a couple: you climb the first half and your partner the second without going down.

title: The Pendulum
description: Do a lateral movement by jumping and swinging with one arm.

title: Tyrannosaurus Rex
description: Climb keeping your elbows close to your ribs at all times.

title: Limit Resistance
description: Go up and down the same block 3 times in a row without touching the ground.

title: Hands Back
description: Cross a section of plate without using your hands.

title: Crystal Wall
description: You cannot use any volume of the wall, only the dams in place.

title: Spagat
description: Keep both feet on holds at least 1.5 meters apart during one step.

title: flashmob
description: 3 people must be in the same block, at the same time, crossing each other.

title: Crab Claw
description: You can only use holds that allow a pincer grip.

title: The Astronaut
description: Move each hand and foot extremely slowly (3s per movement).

title: Investment
description: Finish the block hanging only by your feet (bat-hang).

title: Precision Throw
description: Throw a dynamic and land with only one hand on the target prey.

title: The Table
description: Keep your body fully stretched in a slump.

title: Without Own Feet
description: Climb without using foot holds (you can use hand holds for support)

title: Battery Charging
description: Rest on a hold for 30 seconds with one arm and then another 30 with the other.

title: Triple Tap
description: Before grabbing the next hold, touch it 3 times with your hand.

title: One Arm
description: Climb a full low-grade route using only your non-dominant arm.

title: Toe-Heel
description: Perform a movement where you use the tip of one foot and the heel of the other.

title: Synchrony
description: Find someone and do the same block at the same time.

title: Frog Jump
description: Do a movement where both feet jump at the same time to new holds.

title: Zero Errors
description: If you miss a move or slip a foot, you have to start from scratch.

title: Perfect Dihedral
description: Climb a corner using only opposition technique (pushing yourself against walls).

title: Fair Monkey
description: Climb a short section with just your legs.

title: Acid Resistance
description: Do 10 pull-ups on a hold with a good grip, before starting the block.

title: The Mime
description: Climb without looking at your hands, you can only look at your feet.

title: Final Sprint
description: Do a block, completing the last 4 movements in less than 3 seconds.

title: Cat Feet
description: Climb using only the extreme balls of your feet on each support.

title: No Thumbs
description: Prohibited from using the thumb in any grip (open hand only).

title: The Crane
description: Stay on one foot 10 seconds before each dynamic step.

title: Double Dynamic
description: Do a block, completing at least one dynamic double, throwing both hands simultaneously to the next hold.

title: Blind Climbing
description: Close your eyes right after touching the first hold with your hand.

title: The Pendulum
description: Use a leg swing to gain momentum in a side step.

title: Zero Oxygen
description: Do 5 movements in a row while holding your breath.

title: Giant's Pass
description: Skip a medium-hand hold by using a very high foot.

title: Mirror Mode
description: Exactly copy the movements your partner next to you makes.

title: Total Voltage
description: Don't let any part of your clothing touch the wall when climbing.

title: Terminal strip
description: Complete a block that only has strip holds.

title: Crossing of Hands
description: Perform at least two different arm crossings before reaching the top.

title: The Chimney
description: Hold for 10 seconds, resting your back on the wall and your feet on the opposite wall. (Do it in a corner)

title: Infinite Journey
description: Travel 10 lateral meters without touching the ground.

title: One Foot
description: Climb an easy block using only your right foot (the left one dangles).

title: Shoulder Touch
description: Touch your opposite shoulder before each new hand grip.

title: Step of Faith
description: Complete the block looking up, be careful not to step on other blocks' prey.

title: Shared Load
description: Hold your partner so he can reach a top.

title: Arrowhead
description: Make a 'deadpoint': reach the prey at the point of zero gravity.

title: Soft Hands
description: You cannot reposition any hand; Wherever it falls, there it stays.

title: Scorpion
description: Do a heel hook above the height of your head.

title: Lock at 120
description: Keep your arm almost straight but in tension for 3 seconds before moving.

title: The Clock
description: You have exactly 20 seconds to finish; neither one more nor one less.

title: Pure Adhesion
description: Use only the palms of your hands (no fingers) on blunt holds.

title: Side Step
description: Cross one leg behind the other for support.

title: Mental Resistance
description: Hangs from a 10s strip at the end of a hard block.

title: Clap
description: Use the hand opposition technique (one pushes, one pulls) on a block.

title: Long jump
description: Do a lateral dynamic more than a meter away.

title: The Final Clamp
description: Finish the block by holding the 'top' with just a clamp in your hands

title: Equilibrist
description: Cross a volume by walking on it without using your hands.

title: Echo Way
description: During the rest of the rounds, you agree to say the color of the prey you touch, otherwise the rest of the challenges will be cancelled.

title: Three Fingers
description: You can only use index, middle and ring fingers in the entire route.

title: Rubber sole
description: Clean your feet before climbing; You can't leave a mark on the wall.

title: Helping Hand
description: Reach for the top while shaking hands with someone on the floor.

title: Historic puncture
description: Throw a dynamic but stay completely still when receiving it.

title: Bicycle
description: Make a bicycle.

title: Blunts without Magnesium
description: Complete a blunt block without using magnesium on your hands.

title: Iron Lumbars
description: In a collapse, keep your feet together even if your hands move.

title: Reverse Climbing
description: Start at the top and go down to the start in a controlled manner.

title: 360 coordination
description: Twist around into a standing hold before continuing up.

title: Flexo-Extension
description: Stretch your arm completely before going for each new prey.

title: Harakiri
description: Get on a block, and fall dramatically. The rest vote on whether it was realistic or not.

title: The Anchor
description: Keep one foot hooked while moving both hands in succession.

title: Elbow Up
description: Always keep your elbows above the level of your hands.

title: Dwarf Pass
description: Use only the foot holds closest to your hands.

title: Indomitable Finger
description: Scale using only the index finger of each hand.

title: Force of Gravity
description: Release your feet in the final movement and finish with your arms alone.

title: Slow Motion
description: It takes exactly 5 seconds to close each hand grip.

title: Symphony of Feet
description: Every time you move one foot, you must touch the wall with the same foot 2 times before.

title: The Bridge
description: Keep your feet and hands on different walls and blocks (4 blocks) you have 20 seconds RUN!

title: Without looking
description: Once you grab a hold, you can't look at your feet again.

title: Double Tap
description: Touch your knee with your free hand before moving to the next one.

title: Bear Hug
description: Climb a large volume by surrounding it with both arms at the same time.

title: Ballerina Point
description: Stand only on your big toe on tiny holds.

title: Static Resistance
description: Stay blocked in the middle of the boulder for 20 seconds.

title: Somersault
description: Do a foot dynamic at a volume and stay balanced.

title: Reverse Hand
description: Use at least one hand grip in an 'inverted' position.

title: manual flip
description: In the middle of the block, take an object out of your pocket, throw it into the air so that it spins around, and pick it up again without it falling.

title: The Monkey
description: Swing while hanging on one hand before jumping to the next.

title: Crossing of Feet
description: Do a change of feet without using the wall, only by direct contact.

title: Extreme Flexibility
description: Put your foot on the same hold where you have your hand.

title: Without Breathing
description: Complete the last 3 movements in apnea.

title: Middle Finger
description: Make a clamp using only your middle finger and thumb.

title: Ant Pass
description: Use at least 10 different footrests.

title: Direct Launch
description: Dynamic from the ground to the third hand hold.

title: Slap
description: Claps the air between two hand holds.

title: Heel strike
description: Keep one heel on for 3 consecutive hand movements.

title: Ice Plate
description: Climb a plate without using your hands for balance, just your feet.

title: Heart Rate
description: Climb to the rhythm of the music playing in the climbing wall.

title: Double Clamp
description: Hold two clamps at the same time and let your feet dangle for 2 seconds.

title: Tennis Elbow
description: Climb without flexing your right arm more than 45 degrees.

title: Lead feet and shame
description: Every time you move your foot, drop it hard (make a lot of noise).

title: The Claw
description: Use only your fingertips.

title: Wrist Spin
description: Rotate your hand 360 degrees before bringing it to each prey.

title: Giant's Step 2
description: Open your legs as much as possible in a vertical section.

title: Side Climbing
description: Complete the block always looking to the right.

title: Two Hands
description: You can only move your hands if both go to new prey at the same time.

title: Total Resistance
description: Go up, down and up the same block again without resting. (To win do it 10 times)

title: The Guide
description: Dictate the steps to a partner while you climb another block. He must listen to you, if he doesn't, you don't earn points.

title: Foot Touch
description: Touch your foot with your hand before grabbing the next hold.

title: Iron Lock
description: Block with one hand while touching the back of your neck with the other.

title: No Hands
description: Cross a 2 meter section of plate without using your hands.

title: Push
description: Use the 'mantle' technique to get up to high volume.

title: Little finger
description: Use your pinky for support in at least one hand grip.

title: Toecap
description: Use only the extreme tip of the jack on a grip pad.

title: Leap Frog 2
description: Dynamic feet on two different supports at the same time.

title: The Statue of Salt
description: Don't move for 10 seconds in the most difficult position on a block.

title: Magic Crossing
description: Cross your legs in front in a balancing side step.

title: Hand in Jug
description: Keep one hand on your waist for 2 movements of the other.

title: Head Balance
description: Rest your forehead on the wall to gain balance in one step.

title: Dance Step 2
description: Change feet by doing a small jump in the air.

title: Stiff Arm
description: Climb a short block with your left arm fully extended.

title: Top touch
description: Touch the top with both hands at the same time after a jump.

title: Under pressure
description: Someone must time you; If you go over 15s, you fail.

title: Extreme Adhesion
description: Use only the friction of the climbing shoes against the smooth wall.

title: War Cry
description: He screams as he performs the hardest move on the block.

title: Hand on back
description: He reaches the top with one hand behind his back.

title: Compass Step
description: Open one leg 90 degrees to the side to stabilize yourself and complete a block.

title: Three Points
description: Always keep 3 limbs fixed before moving the fourth.

title: Explosive Ending
description: Throw a dynamic at the last hold on the block.

title: Green Forest
description: Complete a block using only green holds.

title: Fire in the Hands
description: Make all the red blocks you find in the same area.

title: Blue Sky
description: Climb a route where at least 50% of the holds are blue.

title: Pure Dynamic
description: Complete a block that requires dynamic movement.

title: The Kingdom of Romo
description: Overcome a block that only has blunt holds (no sharp edges).

title: Deadly Rules
description: Climb a route that is predominantly small bars.

title: Yellow Obsession
description: Use only yellow hand holds; the feet are free.

title: Volume Zone
description: Complete a block where you use at least 3 different volumes.

title: Black Monochrome
description: Climb the hardest black route you are able to finish.

title: Crystal dihedral
description: Climb a dihedral area (inner corner) without using foot holds.

title: Crab Claws
description: Find a block that has clamps and do it squeezing with maximum force.

title: Orange Invasion
description: Touch 10 different orange holds before reaching the top.

title: The Gray Crash
description: Overcome any block on the steepest wall in the room.

title: Sharp Edge
description: Climb along the edge of the wall using only lateral holds.

title: Only Jugs
description: Make a difficult block using only the largest holds (jugs).

title: Under the Roof
description: Complete a block that runs entirely along a horizontal roof.

title: Straight Layout
description: Climb a route that goes up in a completely vertical line, without deviating.

title: Double Color
description: Only use prey of two specific colors (e.g. red and blue).

title: Colorful Feet
description: The hands go along the route, but the feet can only touch white prey.

title: Wooden Top
description: If there are wooden holds, complete a block that uses at least one.

title: Forbidden Route
description: It picks a block and decides that one of its key holds is 'off-limits'.

title: Extreme Adhesion
description: Find a lying plate and climb it without using hand holds.

title: Initiation Wall
description: Make 5 different blocks in the kids/beginners area in a row.

title: The Launch
description: Look for a block with an initial jump from the ground.

title: Strips of Three
description: Use only 3 fingers on each track strip.

title: Lucky Color
description: Have a partner choose a color; you must make 3 blocks of that color.

title: Lower Traverse
description: Make a long trip using only holds that are less than 1m away.

title: Phantom Dam
description: Climb a route, jumping every third hold.

title: Only Feet in Volume
description: Use volumes only for your feet, never for your hands.

title: Vertical Rainbow
description: Touch a hold of each color available on the wall before the top.

title: Competition Block
description: Try the rarest or most modern block you see equipped.

title: Left Hand Green
description: Only the left hand can touch green prey.

title: Blunt Challenge 2
description: Hold a 5-second hold on each blunt grip on the block.

title: Feet on the Wall
description: Do not use foot holds, only the grip of the shoe on the wall.

title: Hot Route
description: Complete a warm color block (Red, Orange, Yellow).

title: Cold Route
description: Complete a cold color block (Blue, Green, Violet).

title: The Monofinger
description: Find a hole and use it with just one finger (carefully).

title: Jug Jump
description: Dynamic from a power strip to a large jug.

title: Volume Balance
description: Stand on a volume without using your hands for 15 seconds.

title: Triple Color
description: Climb using Red, Green and Yellow holds only.

title: The Short Roof
description: Overcome a 45-degree drop using only small holds.

title: Zig Zag Color
description: Alternate between two-color holds with each movement.

title: Outlet Dam
description: Keep your hands on the starting hold for 10s before moving.

title: Maximum Incline
description: Make a crossing through the place where the wall is steepest.

title: White Spots
description: Only use holds that have white marks from old magnesium.

title: The Color Bridge
description: Do a split between two holds of different colors.

title: Zero Black Feet
description: Complete a block while avoiding stepping on any black prey.

title: Red Right Hand
description: Your right hand can only touch red-colored prey.

title: The King of Rules
description: Make 3 routes in a row that only have power strips.

title: Color Top
description: The top must be a different color than the rest of the block.

title: Output Volume
description: Start the block with both feet placed on a volume.

title: No Blue Feet
description: Complete your favorite block without using any of its blue foot holds.

title: Finger and Pliers
description: On orange holds, you can only use pincer grip.

title: The Gray Fireplace
description: Climb around a corner using opposition technique on the gray walls.

title: Rainbow Journey
description: Walk the entire wall from side to side touching all the colors.

title: Only New Dams
description: Only use the cleanest or newest looking holds on the block.

title: Setter Challenge
description: Try to complete the block exactly as the outfitter intended.

title: Single Yellow Hand
description: Use only one hand for all the yellow holds on the block.

title: Free Feet, Green Hands
description: Feet anywhere, hands only on green holds.

title: The Grand Finale
description: Jump from the penultimate hold to the top, whatever color it is.
